intake.topic_summary: 🛸30-49 everyday tier gap (0% in 500-stimuli) blocks corpus completeness saturation. Factory 20 candidates exist but not applied to corpus_universe_extended.jsonl yet.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: factory-20-candidates-cover-30-49-uniformly
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: 20 factory candidates distribute uniformly across 🛸30-49 tier (e.g. 5 in 30-34, 5 in 35-39, 5 in 40-44, 5 in 45-49)

falsifiers_preregistered.name: everyday-stimuli-non-cliche
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: candidates avoid pure cliches (의자, 책, 시계 already in 일상사물 category) — should add NEW everyday-tier samples not redundant with existing categories

falsifiers_preregistered.name: post-fill-distribution-balanced
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: post-fill 520-stimuli distribution: 🛸30-49 ≥ 3.8% (20/520), full distribution: 30-49=3.8% / 50-59=2% / 60-69=8% / 70-79=44% / 80-89=29% / 90-99=11% / 100=0.8% — concentration shifts but doesn't invert
